description:
Parent epic: V3 E9: Memory and compaction

Source task 4/6 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Verify memory recalls facts while compaction manages prompt-window pressure.

Epic closure criteria:
- memory and compaction have separate, crisp docs and tests
- compaction does not mutate the canonical transcript

comments.text: Verified the memory/compaction boundary with a regression showing memory prompt recall and compaction prompt-window trimming can coexist in the same runtime context. The test proves compaction trims only provider-facing transcript messages while preserving memory payloads, original messages, and final system prompt injection for both summary and recall. Verified with mix format --check-formatted, mix compile --warnings-as-errors, mix test, mix docs --warnings-as-errors, mix doctor --raise, and git diff --check.

title: E9: Verify memory recalls facts while compaction manages prompt-window pressure
